inferRestTupleShortSource.tlua(7,4): error TLUA1135: Argument expression expected.


==== inferRestTupleShortSource.tlua (3 errors) ====
    // Regression test: tlua panics when inferring [...rest, ...T] from a tuple shorter than fixed-arity constraint
    
    function f<T extends [string]>(args: [...string[], ...T]) {
      // ...
    }
    
    f([])
    ~
!!! error TLUA2554: Expected 1 arguments, but got 0.
!!! related TLUA6210 inferRestTupleShortSource.tlua:3:32: An argument for 'args' was not provided.
      ~
!!! error TLUA1135: Argument expression expected.
       ~
!!! error TLUA1135: Argument expression expected.
